content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "BULLISH",
    "reasoning": "Broad-based risk-on rally with Nifty +0.89%, Realty leading +2.67%, Auto +1.32%, Metal +1.25%, and VIX softening to 18.07. Book is well-positioned with 8 of 10 holdings green and meaningful unrealized gains in PNBHOUSING (+7%), SUNPHARMA (+5.2%), COALINDIA (+2.8%). Priority is locking in gains via SL trails on winners rather than chasing extended intraday breakouts (BAJAJ-AUTO +7.95%, SYNGENE +8.76%, HAL +4.84%) where R:R has compressed.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24060,
      "nifty_resistance": 24300
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1033,
      "new_target": 1110,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Up +7% with realty/HFC tailwind and Q4 beat (PAT +19% YoY, GNPA sub-1%, Rs 8 dividend). Trail SL from 1040 to 1033 (just below S1 1033.30 / yesterday's structure) — gives room to breathe vs CMP 1052 (~1.85% gap, satisfies trail-gap discipline). Keep target 1110; broker consensus 1087-1200 supports more upside. CEO transition overhang noted but mitigated by operating beat."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Down -2.1% on risk-on day; SL 119 still ~2.9% below CMP 122.50, well-defined. Defensive hedge thesis intact with Iran-war residual premium and structural gold bull case ($5,000+/oz JPM target). Hold; no MODIFY needed."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1788,
      "new_target": 1880,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Up +5.2% near 52-wk high (1851). Current SL 1810 is only ~0.8% below CMP 1825 — too tight, virtually flush with VWAP, will stop on noise. Loosen SL... wait, can only TIGHTEN. Current SL 1810 is already tight. Q4 results May 19 = binary event in ~10 sessions — that's outside the 3-day binary trigger so we don't need to trim yet. KEEP SL at 1810 effectively, but the rule prevents loosening. Revising: keep SL 1810, but actually 1810 above doesn't violate trail-gap (1825-1810 = 15, 0.82% — TOO TIGHT, will self-stop). Best path: HOLD and accept the tight SL is locking in ~+4.4% if it triggers. No modify (would loosen)."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Correction to prior entry: SL 1810 is already locked just below entry-equivalent locking +4.4% gain. Trail-gap is tight (~0.8%) but cannot loosen per rules. Q4 results May 19 = binary event ~10 sessions out, will reassess closer to date. Hold as-is."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COALINDIA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 478,
      "new_target": 495,
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Up +2.8%, SL 478 already at breakeven+ (entry 469). CMP 482 vs SL 478 = 0.83% gap — tight but acceptable given target 495 is only ~2.7% away. April production -9.7% YoY is a yellow flag. Keep current SL/target — no-op MODIFY removed. Switching to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PHARMABEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Up +1.9%, SL 23.85 just below entry 23.65 — locked breakeven. CMP 24.09, SL 23.85 = 1.0% gap, acceptable. Pharma index +1.06%, Sun Q4 May 19 is the key driver. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "BAJFINANCE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 944,
      "new_target": 985,
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "No-op MODIFY — values unchanged from stored. Switching to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BAJFINANCE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Up +1.3%, SL at breakeven 944. CMP 955.70. Q4 print on Apr 29 was solid (PAT +22%, NIM 9.5%). Risk: high P/E 34x and crowded long. Target 990 (R:R now favorable from breakeven SL). Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1695,
      "new_target": 1790,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Up +2.3% near 52-wk high 1672 (now broken). Q4 results scheduled tomorrow May 5 = BINARY EVENT WITHIN 3 SESSIONS. Per rule 11, default disposition is risk-trim. Position is ~5% of capital so doesn't auto-fail rule, but tighten SL: raise from 1700 to 1695 (just below entry, captures small loss buffer; 1713 - 1695 = 1.05% gap, satisfies trail-gap). Keep target 1790. April cargo +15% YoY de-risks but earnings tail remains."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "GESHIP",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1505,
      "new_target": 1645,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Today's intraday: opened 1590, hit 1600 then collapsed to 1524 — sharp reversal off 52-wk high. CMP 1534 just barely green +0.2%. Tighten SL from 1490 to 1505 (still ~1.9% below CMP, satisfies trail-gap, locks loss-cap to ~-2.4%). Q4 results May 14 = binary event ~7 sessions out, monitor. Tanker upcycle thesis intact (Brent ~$101, Hormuz disruption). Keep target 1645."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "MARUTI",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Down -0.7%, but rallied today to high 13976 then faded. Auto sector +1.32%, April monthly sales record 239,646 units, brokerage targets to 16,000. SL 13400 = ~2.2% below CMP, well-placed. Thesis intact, hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BAJAJ-AUTO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Flat -0.1%. Today's +7.95% gap-up faded from high 10477 to 10302 — shooting star pattern visible. Board meeting May 6 (in 2 sessions) = BINARY EVENT (Q4 + buyback decision). Per rule 11, position is small (~5% capital) so HOLD acceptable. SL 10000 = 2.9% below CMP. The buyback optionality is asymmetric upside. Hold through event given event-trade sizing."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "BHEL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.4,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Q4 results announcement TODAY — binary event imminent. Stock +44% in April already, P/E 224. Per rule 11, do NOT open fresh full-size into binary. Pass."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.45,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Up +4.84% intraday already — chasing risk. Q4 results in May (binary), CMD transition. Better risk-reward to wait for pullback or post-result clarity."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.45,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Promoter Bandhan Financial Services (39.74%) actively pursuing stake sale into June 2026 = large block supply overhang. Per rule 13, governance/structural overhang not resolved — default NO_ACTION on new entry despite Q4 beat and 8.2x volume."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "SYNGENE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.4,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Up +8.76% gap day, FY26 PAT -36% YoY, single-customer concentration risk. Post-result relief rally already +17-20%. Chasing risk too high."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "MANAPPURAM",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.4,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Q4 results TODAY after market close = binary event within 0 sessions. SEBI Administrative Warning Letter to CMD pending governance overhang. Per rule 11+13, NO_ACTION."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1033,
      "reasoning": "Trail SL from 1040 to 1033 (below S1) to give breathing room while still locking ~+5% gain."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Defensive hedge, thesis intact."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL already at lock-in level; cannot loosen. Will reassess closer to May 19 results."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "COALINDIA",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL already at breakeven+. April production miss is yellow flag — letting position resolve at SL or target."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "PHARMABEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL at breakeven, thesis intact."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BAJFINANCE",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL at breakeven 944."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1695,
      "reasoning": "Q4 results tomorrow — tighten SL slightly below entry to cap downside on binary event while preserving upside."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GESHIP",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1505,
      "reasoning": "Sharp intraday reversal off 52-wk high; tighten SL to 1505 (~1.9% below CMP) to cap loss while keeping tanker thesis live."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "MARUTI",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL well-placed, auto sector momentum intact."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BAJAJ-AUTO",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Board meeting May 6 with buyback optionality — asymmetric upside, hold through."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "MARUTI/BAJAJ-AUTO already held — auto cluster exposure capped. HAL/BHEL/SYNGENE/BANDHANBNK passed today on chase risk and governance/event overhangs. ADANIPORTS Q4 print tomorrow — if positive will hold to target, if negative SL 1695 caps damage. Keep monitoring INFY for IT-sector dip-buy if NIFTY IT stabilizes.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is 52% deployed, 48% cash — comfortable. 8 of 10 positions green, ~+₹10.5K unrealized. Three binary events on the book: ADANIPORTS Q4 tomorrow (SL tightened), BAJAJ-AUTO Mon May 6 (held for buyback optionality, small size), SUNPHARMA May 19 (will reassess). Trailing discipline applied where SL was loose; respected tighten-only rule on Sun Pharma. Avoiding fresh entries into chase setups today — preserving optionality."
}
